Stranger.definition: anyone who does not belong in the environment in which they are found

Attention.definition: the process whereby a person concentrates on some features of the environment to the (relative) exclusion of others

Grab.definition: a mechanical device for gripping an object

Rub.definition: the act of rubbing or wiping

Uncomfortable.definition: conducive to or feeling mental discomfort

Weird.definition: strikingly odd or unusual; - Bram Stoker

Flirt.definition: playful behavior intended to arouse sexual interest

Wants.definition: anything that is necessary but lacking

Ask.definition: make a request or demand for something to somebody

Behind.definition: in or to or toward the rear

Touched.definition: make physical contact with, come in contact with

Random.definition: lacking any definite plan or order or purpose; governed by or depending on chance

Man.definition: an adult person who is male (as opposed to a woman)

Stopped.definition: come to a halt, stop moving

Pervert.definition: a person whose behavior deviates from what is acceptable especially in sexual behavior

Inappropriate.definition: not suitable for a particular occasion etc

Boundary.definition: a line determining the limits of an area
